description: Payloads for CSPs allowing data: in script-src — script execution via data URIs

payloads.description: Script src data URI — plaintext JS
payloads.csp_bypass: data: in script-src allows script loading via data URI

payloads.description: Script src data URI — base64 encoded alert(document.domain)
payloads.csp_bypass: data: with base64 encoding bypasses keyword filters

payloads.description: Script src data URI — no MIME type specified
payloads.csp_bypass: data: without explicit MIME type still executes as JS

payloads.description: Script src data URI — application/javascript MIME
iframe data URI — creates new browsing context
payloads.csp_bypass: data: iframe creates context that may inherit permissive CSP

payloads.description: Object data URI — plugin-context script execution
payloads.csp_bypass: data: in object creates embedded HTML context
